news.title: Groep van 33 personen daagt niet op bij restaurant De Bomma: "Menu stond klaar, maar ze stuurden hun kat" - GVA
news.summary:
# Summary

A group of 33 people failed to show up for their reservation at Belgian restaurant De Bomma, leaving the kitchen with prepared meals and no diners to serve. Instead of canceling or attending, the group sent a cat to the restaurant, adding insult to the no-show. Visitors to the area should know that large group no-shows like this can impact restaurant operations and availability for other potential diners.
